description_long: This is a modern Opel car dealership building with a distinctive angular footprint and a dark exterior. The structure features a prominent main entrance with a yellow accent wall and a wooden deck, flanked by landscaped greenery and a row of evenly spaced trees along one side. The facade displays large Opel logos and branding, with signage above the entrance and on the side. The building has a flat roof and minimal visible windows, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. There is a freestanding blue sign near the street, and the landscaping includes both shrubs and small trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a professional, inviting presence suitable for an urban commercial context.
description: A modern Opel car dealership with a dark, angular exterior, yellow-accented entrance, and landscaped greenery. Prominent branding and sleek architectural lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main yellow-accented entrance, Opel signage, and landscaped greenery with trees.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the row of trees, side facade with Opel logos, and the main entrance partially visible.
description_view_2: Side and rear view with the blue freestanding sign, trees, and a clear view of the building's angular shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade with minimal detailing and the row of trees along the side.
attribute_signage: Large Opel logos and text on the facade above the entrance and side wall; freestanding blue sign near the street; signage is likely illuminated or painted, with bold branding elements.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, with angular forms, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on branding and landscaping.
